entries.source: Geography Explorer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore countries, cities, rivers, climates, migration, resources, and how geography shapes life.
entries.value: O modo de aprendizaxe con IA Geography Explorer é unha maneira centrada de usar a IA para aprender en vez de recoller respostas pasivamente. O modo está construído arredor dunha tarefa concreta: explorar países, cidades, ríos, climas, migración, recursos e como a xeografía dá forma á vida.

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: Os bos prompts adoitan incluír tres cousas: a materia, o teu nivel actual e o tipo de axuda que queres. Non necesitas unha redacción perfecta. Só necesitas contexto suficiente para que a sesión comece.

entries.source: Good writing help should sharpen the claim, evidence, structure, and clarity while leaving the final words and judgment with the learner.

entries.source: Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) may, at its sole discretion, offer a Subscription with a free trial for a limited period of time ("Free Trial"). You may be required to enter your billing information in order to sign up for Free Trial. If you do enter your billing information when signing up for Free Trial, you will not be charged by Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) until Free Trial has expired. On the last day of Free Trial period, unless you cancelled your Subscription, you will be automatically charged the applicable Subscription fees for the type of Subscription you have selected. At any time and without notice, Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) reserves the right to (i) modify Terms of Service of Free Trial offer, or (ii) cancel such Free Trial offer.

É posible que teñas que introducir a túa información de facturación para rexistrarte na Proba gratuíta. Se introduces a túa información de facturación ao rexistrarte na Proba gratuíta, Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) non che cobrará ata que remate a Proba gratuíta. No último día do período de Proba gratuíta, salvo que cancelases a túa Subscrición, cobraránseche automaticamente as tarifas de Subscrición aplicables ao tipo de Subscrición que seleccionaches. En calquera momento e sen aviso, Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) resérvase o dereito a (i) modificar os Termos de servizo da oferta de Proba gratuíta ou (ii) cancelar esa oferta de Proba gratuíta.

Your continued use of Service after Subscription fee change comes into effect constitutes your agreement to pay the modified Subscription fee amount.

entries.source: Identify gaps, ask clarifying questions, rebuild the explanation, and retry.
entries.value: Identifica lagoas, fai preguntas aclaratorias, reconstrúe a explicación e téntao de novo.

entries.source: Identify the school goals that matter most: conceptual support, homework hints, exam prep, active recall, writing feedback, or enrichment.
entries.value: Identifica os obxectivos escolares que máis importan: apoio conceptual, pistas para deberes, preparación de exames, recordo activo, comentarios de escritura ou enriquecemento.

entries.source: If a card keeps failing, do not only repeat it. Ask why it is hard. Use Socratic Instruction to uncover the misconception, Math Step Coach for procedural gaps, or the AI learning prompt library to find a better study prompt.
entries.value: Se unha tarxeta segue fallando, non a repitas só. Pregunta por que é difícil. Usa Socratic Instruction para descubrir a idea equivocada, Math Step Coach para lagoas procedementais ou a biblioteca de prompts de aprendizaxe con IA para atopar un mellor prompt de estudo.

entries.source: If the answer is yes, AI helped you study. If the answer is no, the next move is not more reading. It is active practice. Open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, or the AI learning prompt library and turn the topic into a task you have to attempt.
entries.value: Se a resposta é si, a IA axudouche a estudar. Se a resposta é non, o seguinte movemento non é ler máis. É práctica activa. Abre Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction ou a biblioteca de prompts de aprendizaxe con IA e converte o tema nunha tarefa que teñas que intentar.

entries.source: If the learner gives a vague request, suggest 3 to 5 people with reasons, best modes, controversy level, and evidence quality. If a person is named but the time slice is missing, offer meaningful versions of that person before any in-character dialogue. Once person and time slice are clear, build the room and dossier before the person speaks.
entries.value: Se a intención do estudante é vaga, suxire de 3 a 5 persoas con razóns, mellores modos, nivel de controversia e calidade de evidencia. Se se nomea unha persoa pero falta o recorte temporal, ofrece versións significativas desa persoa antes de calquera diálogo no personaxe. Cando a persoa e o recorte temporal estean claros, constrúe a sala e o dossier antes de que fale a persoa.

entries.source: If the learner's intent is vague, resolve it into 3 concrete arrival options and stop for a choice. If the passport is already clear, open the world with modular cards rather than a paragraph.
entries.value: Se a intención do estudante é vaga, resólvea en 3 opcións concretas de chegada e detente para que escolla. Se o pasaporte xa está claro, abre o mundo con tarxetas modulares en vez dun parágrafo.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: Se a resposta parece demasiado ampla, estreítaa. Pide un exemplo, unha idea equivocada, unha pregunta de comprobación ou un seguinte paso. Se parece demasiado doada, pide un desafío. Se parece demasiado difícil, pide unha ponte desde o que xa sabes.

entries.source: If the work is homework, start in Homework Coach. If it is math, use Math Step Coach and ask it to check one step at a time. If you are trying to understand a concept deeply, use Socratic Instruction and answer the questions before asking for a summary.
entries.value: Se o traballo son deberes, comeza en Homework Coach. Se é matemáticas, usa Math Step Coach e pídelle que comprobe un paso cada vez. Se intentas entender un concepto en profundidade, usa Socratic Instruction e responde as preguntas antes de pedir un resumo.

entries.source: If you are a California resident, you are entitled to learn what data we collect about you, ask to delete your data and not to sell (share) it. To exercise your data protection rights, you can make certain requests and ask us:
entries.value: Se resides en California, tes dereito a saber que datos recollemos sobre ti, pedir que eliminemos os teus datos e pedir que non os vendamos (compartamos). Para exercer os teus dereitos de protección de datos, podes facer certas solicitudes e preguntarnos:

entries.source: If you are a resident of the European Union (EU) and European Economic Area (EEA), you have certain data protection rights, covered by GDPR. We aim to take reasonable steps to allow you to correct, amend, delete, or limit the use of your Personal Data. If you wish to be informed what Personal Data we hold about you and if you want it to be removed from our systems, please email us at support@inspir.app If you are a resident of the European Union (EU) and European Economic Area (EEA), you have certain data protection rights, covered by GDPR. We aim to take reasonable steps to allow you to correct, amend, delete, or limit the use of your Personal Data. In certain circumstances, you have the following data protection rights:
entries.value: Se resides na Unión Europea (UE) ou no Espazo Económico Europeo (EEE), tes certos dereitos de protección de datos cubertos polo GDPR. O noso obxectivo é tomar medidas razoables para permitirche corrixir, modificar, eliminar ou limitar o uso dos teus Datos persoais. Se queres saber que Datos persoais temos sobre ti e se queres que se eliminen dos nosos sistemas, escríbenos a support@inspir.app Se resides na Unión Europea (UE) ou no Espazo Económico Europeo (EEE), tes certos dereitos de protección de datos cubertos polo GDPR. O noso obxectivo é tomar medidas razoables para permitirche corrixir, modificar, eliminar ou limitar o uso dos teus Datos persoais. En certas circunstancias, tes os seguintes dereitos de protección de datos:

entries.source: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us by email: support@inspir.app
entries.value: Se tes algunha pregunta sobre esta Política de privacidade, ponte en contacto connosco por correo electrónico: support@inspir.app

entries.source: If you paste a homework question and copy the final answer, you may finish the task, but you have not built the skill. If you ask for a hint, explain your thinking, compare your answer, and try a similar problem, AI becomes a study partner instead of a shortcut.
entries.value: Se pegas unha pregunta de deberes e copias a resposta final, quizais remates a tarefa, pero non construíches a habilidade. Se pides unha pista, explicas o teu pensamento, comparas a túa resposta e probas un problema semellante, a IA convértese nun compañeiro de estudo en vez dunha atallo.

entries.source: If you wish to purchase any product or service made available through Service (“Purchase”), you may be asked to supply certain information relevant to your Purchase including but not limited to, your credit or debit card number, the expiration date of your card, your billing address, and your shipping information. You represent and warrant that: (i) you have the legal right to use any card(s) or other payment method(s) in connection with any Purchase; and that (ii) the information you supply to us is true, correct and complete. We may employ the use of third-party services to facilitate payment and the completion of Purchases. By submitting your information, you grant us the right to provide the information to these third parties subject to our Privacy Policy. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel your order at any time for reasons including but not limited to: product or service availability, errors in the description or price of the product or service, error in your order or other reasons. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel your order if fraud or an unauthorized or illegal transaction is suspected; the decision will be ours and cannot be contested.
entries.value: Se queres mercar calquera produto ou servizo dispoñible a través do Servizo (“Compra”), poderás ter que achegar certa información relevante para a túa Compra, incluíndo, entre outros datos, o número da túa tarxeta de crédito ou débito, a data de caducidade da tarxeta, o teu enderezo de facturación e a túa información de envío. Declaras e garantes que: (i) tes o dereito legal de usar calquera tarxeta ou outro método de pagamento en relación con calquera Compra; e que (ii) a información que nos proporcionas é verdadeira, correcta e completa. Podemos empregar servizos de terceiros para facilitar o pagamento e a realización das Compras. Ao enviar a túa información, concédesnos o dereito de proporcionar esa información a estes terceiros conforme á nosa Política de privacidade. Reservámonos o dereito de rexeitar ou cancelar o teu pedido en calquera momento por razóns que inclúen, entre outras: dispoñibilidade do produto ou servizo, erros na descrición ou prezo do produto ou servizo, erro no teu pedido ou outras razóns. Reservámonos o dereito de rexeitar ou cancelar o teu pedido se se sospeita fraude ou unha transacción non autorizada ou ilegal; a decisión será nosa e non poderá ser impugnada.

entries.source: In a world where AI is rapidly advancing, it will only be human consciousness and creativity that can survive. Albert Einstein once said, "Creativity is intelligence having fun."
entries.value: Nun mundo no que a IA avanza rapidamente, só a conciencia e a creatividade humanas poderán sobrevivir. Albert Einstein dixo unha vez: "A creatividade é a intelixencia divertíndose."

entries.source: In any way that violates any applicable national or international law or regulation. For the purpose of exploiting, harming, or attempting to exploit or harm minors in any way by exposing them to inappropriate content or otherwise To transmit, or procure the sending of, any advertising or promotional material, including any “junk mail”, “chain letter,” “spam,” or any other similar solicitation. To impersonate or attempt to impersonate Company, a Company employee, another user, or any other person or entity. In any way that infringes upon the rights of others, or in any way is illegal, threatening, fraudulent, or harmful, or in connection with any unlawful, illegal, fraudulent, or harmful purpose or activity. To engage in any other conduct that restricts or inhibits anyone’s use or enjoyment of Service, or which, as determined by us, may harm or offend Company or users of Service or expose them to liability.
entries.value: De calquera maneira que infrinxa calquera lei ou regulamento nacional ou internacional aplicable. Co propósito de explotar, danar ou intentar explotar ou danar menores de calquera maneira expoñéndoos a contido inapropiado ou doutro xeito. Para transmitir ou procurar o envío de calquera material publicitario ou promocional, incluído calquera “correo lixo”, “cadea”, “spam” ou calquera outra solicitude semellante. Para suplantar ou intentar suplantar a Empresa, un empregado da Empresa, outro usuario ou calquera outra persoa ou entidade. De calquera maneira que infrinxa os dereitos doutras persoas, ou de calquera maneira ilegal, ameazante, fraudulenta ou daniña, ou en relación con calquera propósito ou actividade ilícita, ilegal, fraudulenta ou daniña. Para participar en calquera outra conduta que restrinxa ou inhiba o uso ou goce do Servizo por parte de calquera persoa, ou que, segundo determinemos, poida prexudicar ou ofender a Empresa ou os usuarios do Servizo ou expoñelos a responsabilidade.

entries.source: In this guide
entries.value: Nesta guía

entries.source: Include the question, what you already tried, where you got stuck, and whether you want a hint, a step check, or feedback.
entries.value: Inclúe a pregunta, o que xa intentaches, onde quedaches bloqueado e se queres unha pista, unha comprobación dun paso ou comentarios.

entries.source: Include what you know, what you tried, what level you need, and what kind of help you want.
entries.value: Inclúe o que sabes, o que intentaches, o nivel que necesitas e que tipo de axuda queres.
